title: M@kerathiy #4382
definition:
Mecherathite = "he of the dug-out" or "he of the digging tool"

 1) a native or inhabitant of Mecherah
nasbUsage:
Definition: Mecherathite = "he of the dug-out" or "he of the digging tool"

 1) a native or inhabitant of Mecherah

    NASB:  a descriptive name for one of Davids men
